scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,worker -c cyan,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:frontend" "pnpm dev:worker"
scripts.dev:tauri: concurrently -n api,tauri,worker -c cyan,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm --filter @atlas/desktop dev" "pnpm dev:worker"
scripts.infra:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.local-lite.yml up -d postgres redis minio
scripts.infra:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.local-lite.yml down -v && pnpm infra:up
scripts.infra:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.local-lite.yml logs -f postgres redis minio
scripts.db:fresh: prisma migrate deploy && prisma generate && node prisma/seed.js
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm db:generate && pnpm infra:up && node scripts/wait-for-db.mjs && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed
